just farm via interlude or the character events

the banner is for randomized arc 1 awakeners and i dont think its worth unless your a new player who wanna get as much as limited awakeners

Hello! I'm trying to get the achievement "finish in 12 turns" for 8-12, but I'm not able to do enough damage with the fortress mechanic. Does counter or poison bypass the fortress, and if not, is there a character that dispels fortress? For reference, here is the team I'm running (thanks Angbak for the guide!), so let me know if there's something I can fix or tweak. 🙂

If you are not new: most of the things on this banner are dupes you don't particularly need. Avoid.

If you are new: high chance of wheels. The wheels might not be useful, and you want to focus on awakeners. Avoid.
If this question should be in the teambuilding channel let me know; sorry in advance for the mistake!
Yes, all 3 bp wheels are really good

In arc1, only Arachne can bypass fortress.
Did you kill the thing boss summons mid battle?
I don't think there is something that gets summoned in the 8-12 battle? At least, I don't recall that happening.
That's the chapter final boss no?
I think 8-13 is the final boss; I'm on 8-12 which is Lampshade Aisha, the one that gets 5 fortress every turn and has 2 phases.
Arachne to bypass fortress or aigis to delay phase 2 fortress by 1 turn
I've killed him like 3 or 4 times now but he won't die
He has infinite hp bars until cutscene
Rip I got 1 more turn and he has 100 fortress
Okay, I'll build out Aigis and try to place her with my current team and see if that works; thanks! 🙂
Aigis delay works by first deleting the bar then overwrite the phase 2 move with stun
Did you use blood pool to increase your max hp?
how’s the sorel’s event wod experience to those who bought it to +12?

If you wanna cheese it. Just go full offense and use gnosis.

Gnosis resets your exalt to full so you can definitely clear it within 12 turns.

Personally would reccomend coming back when your units levels are higher
Try to get your reload to lvl 6, I see that it's level 5 atm
I tried using gnosis and cleared it at 13, just one turn short, haha. 😛 How high of a level would you recommend I get to?
Yeah, I'm hoping to upgrade it tomorrow or the day after once I collect enough. 🙂
If vortice is going to be your main dps anw, you can level her up to 70 eventually
I was thinking of clearing the story first then coming back to get the achievements
With ya know, op stuff hehe
I've been able to do all the achievements up until this point, but you're right in that I can just come back later. Okay, I'll leave it be for now. 🙂
Sounds good, no need to rush the achievements anw
Guys how the hell support Pollux 12+ can carry his damage is very ass
u need to understand how his kit works, he only deals dmg with atonement buff active
and u need to stack sin marks at the start of the fight for him to do bleed
he does 8k if you dont have atonement buff
Can you explain that in 5 years old terms
atonement buff = big damage when play first pollux command card
All his cards are ass not just the first one

Deals dmg when he has [Buff]

Gets [Buff] when

1. First card played
2. First card played after exalt
3. All cards played after OE at 50%
4. First card played after 3rd cast of the same Sacred Heart
Yeah I do that but he is still nowhere near 100k+ damage
Do you mean per card played? Which game mode
I just play his cards when I can my team is xu /new lady/ faint/ Pollux all s0 except Pollux he is 12+
He's.. combo and set up based

8 turns. Each death buys you 1 turn of him not doing anything

I wouldn't recommend him for a beginner

GMurphy/Miryam/Corpo/Clem/Horla/Hameln/Tawil/Ryker for the premium ones 
Celeste/Goliath/Faros/Casiah/Tinct/Jenkins/Winkle are also standard options you can use with him

Pity on standard is 30 and you have a little chance (like 0.1%) to find also old Limiteds there

Hard Pity on limited banners of SSR Awakeners is 90, since it's always 30 for soft pity but there Is a 33/66 % sistem and you can lose (max) 2 times in a row

Hard pity for SSR wheels (weapons) is 60. There is 50/50 here

Red (Caro) has their own gauge to make extra card called Embryo for buff and more stuff
Purple can domain expansion

Ye it's fine, as you can get an item to reset an unit later on (aka reset to lv1, return all investment)

This item is called **Origin Of Time**, it provides two main benefits:

**Full Refund**: Recovers all XP and materials you invested in the character you use it on.

**Duplicate Conversion**: Only for Standard Awakeners (not for Limited in the Standard pool or the starting SR Awakeners), converts all additional copies into Standard "selectors," which can subsequently be used to obtain or duplicate other Standard Awakeners of your choice (not Limited in Standard).

This process is also applicable to **Standard Wheels** (except the Limited in the Standard pool).

It is primarily obtained from the developers through special in-game mail during specific events, such as anniversaries or major updates. It is used for re-allocating resources to build a better team.

can someone fact check this equation for the total dmg done after bleed by gelot
Last time I saw these numbers was 4 years ago

idk abt this but we can just split this up
raw dmg from flials = ax
total final bleed = 100% of flail dmg at exalt lv6 + starting bleed = ax + b
bleed procs = 0.3x(x+1)a + 0.3xb
the bleed proc from 4cost does not add more bleed
And yeah i took that into account
The summation is cebause the bleed proc scales with each additional flail

So for example we do a = 1000 and bleed starts at 500, the first flail is 150 bleed, the second adds 300 to the 150 which gives us 450 for the total bleed proc for the 2nd, but we also have to calculate the first flail proc into the total damage
What banner should I use all my pulls in?
New acc, just finished the tutorial

yeah u can just seperate the initial bleed and set 0.3bx
then for the bleed proc from flails, first flail will proc 1 flail worth of bleed, 2nd will proc 2 flail worth of bleed, 3rd will be 3 and so on so it just 1+2+3+...+x which can be simplified to x(x+1)/2 triangular number is a pretty common pattern
Oh, all I did was the 5 pulls that the game made me do, and I got some ssr
Other than that, didn't touch anything
it all addition and multiplication so u can seperate it for easier processing

summation function kinda makes it hard to read
It was just the best way i could put my thoughts down lmao
And also i added b to that bc it includes starting bleed
u can do total bleed proc = bleed proc from flail bleed + bleed proc from statting bleed
which is wat i did so it easier to understand and compute
cuz often ur starting bleed is 0 anyway
